name: skillcrossroads
description: Skill Crossroads CLI — the signpost for Claude Code artifacts. Audit a Skill and get an evidence-based quality scorecard with a letter grade: ship, fix, or rethink.
comment: @beacon/core is a private workspace package (never published). It is BUNDLED into dist/cli.js at publish time (prepublishOnly → esbuild), so the published package is self-contained and has zero runtime deps — that is what makes `npx skillcrossroads` and the GitHub Action work.
